title: Farming Equipment and Technology Fund (FETF) 2025 (closed)
body: " The Farming Equipment and Technology Fund (FETF) 2025 is closed for applications.  Find out about other grants and funds.   FETF 2025 includes 3 grants to help you buy equipment or technology to:     improve productivity manage slurry improve animal health and welfare    Grant value: between £1,000 and £25,000 for each grant theme.    "
